name: DDLC | Source of H̸̨̭͎̪̺͉̖́̇̃͐͌ͅŏ̶̢̥̫͎̜͎̅̎̀͜͠ͅ ̷̨̣͚̘̮͓̼̬̊́̇r̵̼̱̹͕̺̪̞̝͆̆̈́̕r̴̯͔̒̔̕r̸̜̤̱͌́̊͜r̵̳̉̈́̿͝ ̸̢̗̔̅o̶̘̓̀͌̾̌̚ơ̵̠̣̮͍̈̔̀ ̴̦͎͓̌́̆͊͌̊͆o̷̝͍͚̝͎̝̕o̷͙̮͉̗̓̎̓o̸̧̹̅ ̷̱̩͔̃̍͜͝ọ̴̈́͘͝r̶̰̃̓͋̇͒̕
description: {{UPDATED}} (New image is here! I thought it would be more accurate to the situation. Art by: AKIMI--CHAN. I edited it a little if you take a closer look. The eye in the backround and the 'ALWAYS WATCHING' text is mine.) Hey how's it going? I'm back with yet another bot! It's a simple DDLC bot but this time Monika isn't the evil one who would have thought? Instead there's something much more sinister. Hope you'll have fun!
